title: dnf bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[4.14.0-31.0.1]
- Replaced bugzilla.oracle.com references [Orabug: 34202300]
- Fixed python stack trace with updateinfo list cves command [Orabug: 32749660]
- Replaced upstream bugzilla reporting reference. [Orabug: 32829849]

[4.14.0-31]
- Introduce ,  variables, shell-style
  variable substitution (RHEL-65817)

[4.14.0-30]
- Mark transient transactions in DNF history (RHEL-84512)
- Warn/disallow changes outside /usr, /etc with --transient (RHEL-84499)

[4.14.0-29]
- man page: don't mark mandatory option parameters as optional (RHEL-63958)

[4.14.0-28]
- Add dnf4 provides and symlink /usr/bin/dnf4 -> /usr/bin/dnf-3 (RHEL-82310)

[4.14.0-27]
- usage help: don't mark mandatory option parameters as optional (RHEL-63958)

[4.14.0-26]
- package: remote_location() takes basedir into account (RHEL-71125)
full_text:
[4.14.0-31.0.1]
- Replaced bugzilla.oracle.com references [Orabug: 34202300]
- Fixed python stack trace with updateinfo list cves command [Orabug: 32749660]
- Replaced upstream bugzilla reporting reference. [Orabug: 32829849]

[4.14.0-31]
- Introduce ,  variables, shell-style
  variable substitution (RHEL-65817)

[4.14.0-30]
- Mark transient transactions in DNF history (RHEL-84512)
- Warn/disallow changes outside /usr, /etc with --transient (RHEL-84499)

[4.14.0-29]
- man page: don't mark mandatory option parameters as optional (RHEL-63958)

[4.14.0-28]
- Add dnf4 provides and symlink /usr/bin/dnf4 -> /usr/bin/dnf-3 (RHEL-82310)

[4.14.0-27]
- usage help: don't mark mandatory option parameters as optional (RHEL-63958)

[4.14.0-26]
- package: remote_location() takes basedir into account (RHEL-71125)

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20535-0.html
